hooks.command: bash -c 'p=hooks/preflight.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && grep -qF session-preflight "$r/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" 2>/dev/null && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[session-preflight] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
